body:
Objective: Fix Facebook Live video not loading on Maad 97.5 FM site.

Context: Explorer investigation found root cause. Files: `src/app/api/live-video/route.ts` and `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx`.

Root cause: Hardcoded Graph API v19.0 (sunset ~Dec 2024) in `route.ts:18`. Plus client silently swallows errors, mobile never loads video, and desktop/mobile JSX is duplicated.

Action Steps:
1. **`src/app/api/live-video/route.ts:18`** — bump Graph API version `v19.0` → `v23.0` (current as of mid-2026). Keep the rest of the URL structure. Verify the `live_videos` endpoint path stays the same.
2. **`src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx`** — add user-facing error state:
   - Add an `error` state variable (string | null).
   - In the catch block (~line 48), set error state with a short user-facing message like "Unable to load live video. Try again later." Keep the console.error too.
   - Render the error message in the UI when set (small styled text, brand orange if you want).
3. **`src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx:17-19`** — fix mobile early-return. The `useEffect` currently returns early on mobile so `isLive` stays false and video never loads on mobile. Remove the mobile early-return so the fetch runs on both mobile and desktop.
4. **`src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx:81-146`** — deduplicate the identical desktop/mobile JSX branches. Consolidate into a single render block. Keep the responsive behavior (the `isMobile` check was only guarding the duplicate; if the JSX is truly identical, one block serves both).
5. Run `npm run lint` and `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify no type/lint errors.

Constraints:
- Preserve existing behavior except the bugs being fixed.
- Keep brand colors (#FD7B2B primary orange).
- Do NOT change the access token env var names.
- Do NOT touch `next.config.js` — security headers are fine.
- Keep the iframe embed mechanism (no SDK).

Deliverables:
- Files changed: `src/app/api/live-video/route.ts`, `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx`.
- Report: list of changes made with line refs, lint/tsc results, any concerns.

Prerequisites: Read `src/app/api/live-video/route.ts` and `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx` fully before starting. (Explorer already reviewed — trust the findings above but verify line numbers as you edit.)
